signIn.headline: Sign in to your space
signIn.subtitle: Access your personalized services and manage your applications securely.
signIn.versionInfo: Our application is now available in version {version}
signIn.successMessage: A sign-in link has been sent to your email address

errors.USER_NOT_FOUND: No account is associated with this email address.
errors.ACCOUNT_INACTIVE: Your account is inactive. Please contact support.
errors.SERVER_ERROR: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.RESEND_ERROR: Email sending failed. Please try again.
errors.INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.

magicLink.subject: Your sign-in link / DevNext01
magicLink.body: Your user experience and the protection of your data remain our absolute priority within this institution.

registration.subject: Your registration code / DevNext01
registration.body: Thank you for registering on DEV_NEXT01. Here is your 6-digit confirmation code:
registration.expiryNote: This code is valid for 2 hours.
registration.fallbackText: If you did not request this code, please ignore this email.

register.headline: Create your provider space
register.subtitle: Join our network of independent relocation consultants.
register.title: Create an account
register.acceptTerms: I accept the Terms of Use

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
errors.acceptTermsRequired: You must accept the terms of use.
errors.acceptPrivacyRequired: You must accept the privacy policy.
errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account already exists with this email address.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

verify.headline: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: A confirmation code has been sent to you.
verify.title: Confirm your registration
verify.resendSuccess: A new code has been sent to {email}
verify.emailSentTo: A 6-digit code has been sent to
verify.expiresIn: This code is valid for 2 hours.

errors.pinInvalid: Incorrect code. You have {remaining} attempt(s) remaining.
errors.pinExpired: This code has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.pinBlocked: Too many incorrect attempts. Please request a new code.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.message: You do not have the required permissions to access this page.
